channel.title: Conventional Branch on Xianpeng Shen
channel.description: Recent content in Conventional Branch on Xianpeng Shen
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2017–2025 Xianpeng Shen. All rights reserved.

item.title: Conventional Branch Official Skill Is Here—Install with One Command
item.author: xianpeng.shen@gmail.com (Xianpeng Shen)
item.description: A user opened an issue hoping Conventional Branch could provide an official Agent Skill, which I thought was a very reasonable request. I implemented it the same day, and now it can be downloaded and used with a single npx skills add command. Coincidentally, the project also surpassed 100 Stars this week, so I’ll talk about that too.

item.title: Conventional Branch Specification One-Year Anniversary — From Zero to Global Developer Adoption
item.author: xianpeng.shen@gmail.com (Xianpeng Shen)
item.description: 12K+ visits, multilingual translations, and global developer adoption—the journey of the Conventional Branch specification’s first year

item.title: Conventional Branch Specification Released!
item.author: xianpeng.shen@gmail.com (Xianpeng Shen)
item.description: This article introduces the Conventional Branch specification, which provides a structured naming convention for Git branches to enhance readability and collaboration.
